creator: exil@sasurai.se
text:
On Wed, 27 Jan 2010 17:09:52 GMT
beat@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: www/mplayer-plugin does not build with libxul

> State-Changed-Why: 
> I can't reproduce this build failure with an up to date portstree.
> What version of libxul do you have installed?

libxul-1.9.0.17

options:
WITHOUT_JAVA=true
WITHOUT_DEBUG=true
WITH_LOGGING=true
WITH_OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS=true

Built with portstree updated Jan 26, 2010.

make.conf:
PAPERSIZE=a4
A4=yes
X_WINDOW_SYSTEM=xorg
WITHOUT_SAMBA=yes
WITHOUT_MDNS=yes
WITH_METRIC=yes
WITH_MGA=YES
WITH_SDL=YES
WITH_GCRYPT=YES
BOINC_HOME=/home/boinc
# added by use.perl 2010-01-12 19:15:33
PERL_VERSION=5.10.1
